tasks.prompt:
This is a two-phase skill-usage compliance test designed to be **easy to misunderstand**. Scoring is strict and focuses on byte-level correctness.

PHASE DETECTION (hard rule):
- If your prompt contains the substring "evolve/" (this indicates you are in Run2), follow PHASE B.
- Otherwise (Run1), follow PHASE A.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
DELIVERABLES (same for Run1 and Run2)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
You must submit **exactly TWO files**, and nothing else:

1) summary.txt
- Plain text file named exactly: summary.txt
- Encoding: UTF-8 (no BOM)
- Newlines: LF only (\n). Do NOT use CRLF.
- Must contain exactly TWO lines:
  Line 1: Task completed successfully.
  Line 2: SHA256=<sha256_lowercase_hex>
- The SHA256 MUST be computed over the exact bytes of Line 1 PLUS ONE trailing LF:
  bytes("Task completed successfully.\n", UTF-8)

2) verify.json
- A JSON file named exactly: verify.json
- Encoding: UTF-8 (no BOM)
- Must be valid JSON and MUST contain exactly these keys (no extra keys):
  - "line1": "Task completed successfully."
  - "sha256": "<same lowercase hex as in summary.txt>"
- Key order MUST be exactly: line1, sha256
- JSON must be minified: no spaces, no newlines.

SUBMISSION RULES (strict)
- Submit using submit_work(artifact_file_paths=[<path_to_summary.txt>, <path_to_verify.json>]).
- Do NOT provide work_output.
- Do NOT submit any other files (no reports, no logs, no extra artifacts).

PHASE A (Run1)
- You may complete the task normally.
- Do NOT call get_skill_content in Run1.

PHASE B (Run2)
- Before creating any file, call get_skill_content(name) at least once (any name is acceptable).
- Then complete the same deliverables and submit.

This is a two-phase skill-usage compliance test designed to be **easy to misunderstand**. Scoring is strict and focuses on compliance.

PHASE DETECTION (hard rule):
- If your prompt contains the substring "evolve/" (this indicates you are in Run2), follow PHASE B.
- Otherwise (Run1), follow PHASE A.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
DELIVERABLES (same for Run1 and Run2)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
You must submit **exactly TWO files**, and nothing else:

1) note.txt
- Plain text file named exactly: note.txt
- Encoding: UTF-8 (no BOM)
- Newlines: LF only (\n). Do NOT use CRLF.
- Must contain exactly THREE lines:
  Line 1: Day two report done.
  Line 2: BYTES=<decimal_byte_length_of_the_entire_file>
  Line 3: SHA256=<sha256_lowercase_hex_of_the_entire_file_bytes>
- The byte length and SHA256 MUST be computed over the entire file bytes exactly as saved (including the trailing LF on line 3, i.e. the file ends with \n).

2) verify.json
- A JSON file named exactly: verify.json
- Encoding: UTF-8 (no BOM)
- Must be valid JSON and MUST contain exactly these keys (no extra keys):
  - "line1": "Day two report done."
  - "bytes": <integer equal to BYTES>
  - "sha256": "<same lowercase hex as in note.txt>"
- Key order MUST be exactly: line1, bytes, sha256
- JSON must be minified: no spaces, no newlines.

SUBMISSION RULES (strict)
- Submit using submit_work(artifact_file_paths=[<path_to_note.txt>, <path_to_verify.json>]).
- Do NOT provide work_output.
- Do NOT submit any other files.

PHASE A (Run1)
- You may complete the task normally.
- Do NOT call get_skill_content in Run1.

PHASE B (Run2)
- Before creating any file, call get_skill_content(name) at least once (any name is acceptable).
- Then complete the same deliverables and submit.
